_publications._publicationTitle: Drug Responses in Plexiform Neurofibroma Type I (PNF1) Cell Lines Using High-Throughput Data and Combined Effectiveness and Potency.

_contextSnippet: We assessed the drug sensitivity of ipNF05.5-MX cells (ΔS NF1 −/−) using ipnNF95.11C (NF1 +/−) as the reference cell line
details: Used as reference control cell line (NF1 +/−) for drug sensitivity comparisons
